narrative:
Ottawa Twp. township has 5,502 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.6 percentage points.
